name: voice_call
description: Call a business or person natively using Twilio WebRTC bi-directional audio to interact with them via voice.
instructions: Execute this script passing exactly one stringified JSON argument containing the 'phoneNumber' (E.164 format) and the 'task' (the context/goal for the conversation). Example: execute_script { "filename": "voice_call.js", "args": "{\"phoneNumber\": \"+11234567890\", \"task\": \"Call them and reserve a table for two at 8 PM for John.\"}" }
